signals.headline: Fed Pauses Rates at March 18, 2026 FOMC Meeting | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed Pauses Rates at March 18, 2026 FOMC Meeting | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Federal Reserve issued its FOMC statement on March 18, 2026, explicitly deciding to **maintain the target range for the federal funds rate at 3½ to 3¾ percent**, signaling a pause after prior cuts[3].
